mapper.select: SELECT FROM series_posts WHERE post_id = #{postId} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug FROM posts p JOIN series_posts sp ON p.id = sp.post_id WHERE sp.series_id = #{seriesId} AND sp.sort_order < #{sortOrder} AND p.status = 1 AND p.is_delelte = 0 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sp.sort_order DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug FROM posts p JOIN series_posts sp ON p.id = sp.post_id WHERE sp.series_id = #{seriesId} AND sp.sort_order > #{sortOrder} AND p.status = 1 AND p.is_delelte = 0 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sp.sort_order ASC LIMIT 1
